zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Vetter於1586年3月25日在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根庫陳受洗時，她的父親Conrad Vetter24歲，母親Barbara Panthaleon25歲。她和Peter Kurtz至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Vetter于1586年3月25日在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根庫陳受洗时，她的父亲Conrad Vetter24岁，母亲Barbara Panthaleon25岁。她和Peter Kurtz至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Vetter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Mathias, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Wendelin, Balzer, Dieter, Ernst, Ewald, Hannelore.

German: nickname from Middle High German veter(e) ‘(paternal) uncle, nephew’. The word is from Old High German fetiro (a derivative of fater ‘father’), which was also used more generally to denote any male relative; the meaning of modern German Vetter is ‘cousin’. Compare Vedder .

variants.name: Vedder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wolf, Hellmuth, Kurt, Orlo, Dietrich, Eckhard, Helmut.
German and Dutch: relationship name from Middle Low German and Middle Dutch vedder ‘(paternal) uncle, cousin’, which was also used more generally to denote any male relative. Compare Vetter .

History: Many of the American Vedders are descended from Harmen Albertse Vedder from the Netherlands, who was in Beverwyck in New Netherland (now Albany, NY) before 1657 and died in Schenectady, NY, in or before 1715.

variants.name: Vetters
meanings: German: from the possessive form of   Vetter  .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Vetter was christened on 25 March 1586, in Kuchen, Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Conrad Vetter, was 24 and her mother, Barbara Panthaleon, was 25. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Peter Kurtz.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Vetter a été baptisée le 25 mars 1586, à Kuchen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Conrad Vetter, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Barbara Panthaleon, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Peter Kurtz.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Vetter am 25. März 1586 in Kuchen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Conrad Vetter 24 und ihre Mutter Barbara Panthaleon 25. Sie hatte mit Peter Kurtz mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Vetter è stato battezzato il 25 marzo 1586 nel Kuchen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Conrad Vetter, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Barbara Panthaleon, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Peter Kurtz.

ja.Überkingen, Geislingen, Württemberg, Ger: ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ジェイスリンジェンuバーキンジェン
ja.Geislingen, Württemberg, Deutschland: ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ジェイスリンジェン

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Vetterが1586年3月25日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス グoップインジェンクチェンで洗礼を受けた時，父Conrad Vetterは24歳，母Barbara Panthaleonは25歳であった。彼女はPeter Kurtzとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Vetter(이)가 1586년 3월 25일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 그o핀겐 쿠천에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad Vetter(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Panthaleon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Peter Kurtz(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Vetter foi batizada em 25 de março de 1586, em Kuchen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Conrad Vetter, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Panthaleon, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Peter Kurtz.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Vetter была крещена 25 марта 1586 г. в местности кучэн, ландкрис гoппинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Conrad Vetter было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Barbara Panthaleon, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Peter Kurtz.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Vetter se bautizó el 25 de marzo de 1586, en Kuchen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Conrad Vetter, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Barbara Panthaleon, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Peter Kurtz.
